caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing slightly as he speaks into the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests an informal yet professional discussion, possibly centered around business, lifestyle, or personal experiences.
